title: pelargonium × lepidum
intro: Pelargonium × lepidum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × lepidum lie in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and rosmarinic acid, providing anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu due to its antimicrobial and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × lepidum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote relaxation and support immune function.
